title: Paper Mario The Origami King Mod
description: it's about Paper Mario The Origami King (PMTOK) in Minecraft! [Note: it's in Alpha.]
body:
This mod adds things such as (I'm gonna name them all I think) Paper Mario, PM Armor, PM Hammer, Colored Pencils, Rubber Bands, Hole Punch, Tape, Tape (Free), Scissors, Stapler, King Olly (Phase 1), Olivia Hammer, 1,000-Fold-Arms, PM with 1,000 arms, And I think thats it. No wait there's a structure for the Dual-Bladed Duelist (Scissors) called: Scissors Podium. 
I highly recommend Sodium because it will boost your FPS by like 300 or something.
[**Sodium**](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium)!
![All the **UGLY** bosses!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d96d33daba2153ecff250b3f1e1b6bc9ad33a0e5.png)
All the **UGLY** bosses!
